title: taraxacum toletanum
intro: Taraxacum toletanum, a rare and lesser-known species of the dandelion genus, is a flowering plant native to Portugal. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Taraxacum toletanum include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the leaves, roots, and flowers of the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, often in combination with other herbs to enhance their medicinal properties.
